query:
SELECT e.name, e.neighborhood, c.name as category 
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE c.id IN (5, 6, 7, 12, 13) 
ORDER BY c.id, e.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT e.name, e.neighborhood, c.name as category 
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE c.id IN (5, 6, 7, 12, 13) 
ORDER BY c.id, e.name;
